column1: # Sweep nano_s14 — Tier C: knobs Spark/AGX are NOT testing (300 steps × seed=42)
# PURPOSE: complement Spark (Tier A GPTQ) and AGX (Tier B LOGIT_SOFTCAP/MLR/BETA2/MUON).
# Nano σ at 180 steps was ~0.010 (seed-to-seed). At 300 steps expect σ ≈ 0.007.
# Effect detection threshold: |Δ| > 0.010 → real signal; 0.005–0.010 → WEAK; <0.005 → NOISE.
# Interleaved baselines at rows 1, 6, 12 for drift correction.
